creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
New port syncal-0.5 a tool for synchronize the ical calendar/todo
	application with the PalmPilot.

Fix: 

Commit it, and find a smarter solution for the ical patch problem ;-)
How-To-Repeat: 
	Fetch the port from

	ftp://ftp.uni-bielefeld.de/pub/systems/FreeBSD/lkoeller/syncal-0.5-port.tar.gz
